3400073293.message: ADAL user realm account response unknown Check your Microsoft Entra configuration, and make sure that users can successfully authenticate.

3399548929.message: Need user sign-in This issue should be transient. It occurs when the user quickly signs out before the enrollment task happens.

3400073236.message: ADAL security token request failed. Check your Microsoft Entra configuration, and make sure that users can successfully authenticate.

3400073247.message: ADAL-integrated Windows authentication is only supported in federated flow Plan your Microsoft Entra hybrid join implementation

3399942148.message: The server or proxy wasn't found. This issue should be transient, when the client can't communicate with cloud. If it persists, make sure the client has consistent connectivity to Azure.

2149056532.message: Specific platform or version is not supported Make sure the device meets the minimum requirements for co-management.

2147943568.message: Element not found This issue should be transient. If it persists, contact Microsoft Support.

2192179208.message: Not enough memory resources are available to process this command. This issue should be transient, it should resolve itself when the client retries.

3399614467.message: ADAL Authorization grant failed for this assertion Check your Microsoft Entra configuration, and make sure that users can successfully authenticate.

2149056517.message: Generic Failure from management server, such as DB access error This issue should be transient. If it persists, contact Microsoft Support.

2149134055.message: Winhttp name not resolved The client can't resolve the name of the service. Check the DNS configuration.

2149134050.message: internet timeout This issue should be transient, when the client can't communicate with cloud. If it persists, make sure the client has consistent connectivity to Azure.

0x87D20417.message: Scenario: When running Configuration Manager version 2010, you may notice that an automatic deployment rule fails and returns Last Error Code of 0x87D20417. In the PatchDownloader.log, you see Failed to create temp file with GetTempFileName() at temp location C:\Windows\TEMP\, error 80 and 0-byte fi
0x87D20417.description: Workaround: Remove all the files from the temp directory specified in the PatchDownloader.log and rerun the ADR. Resolution: Install KB 4600089, Update Rollup for Microsoft Endpoint Configuration Manager current branch, version 2010.

0x80000007.description: Additional information for error resolution: Use the installation logs and Configuration Manager application logs to determine why installation stopped. Merge the logs so you can easily review what happened before the 0x80000007L error. Use eventvwr.msc to review the Windows event logs for additional events that occurred around the time of the installation failure.

AdminRequired.message: Local administrator permissions are required to install Directory Synchronization

DirSyncAlreadyInstalled.message: The Directory Sync tool is already installed. Version {0}
DirSyncAlreadyInstalled.resolution: Uninstall all earlier versions of the Directory Sync tool before you try to install the latest version.

DirSyncNotInstalledError.message: A complete installation of the Azure Active Directory Sync tool was not detected on this machine. Please uninstall any versions of this tool and then reinstall the most recent version.
DirSyncNotInstalledError.resolution: Uninstall all earlier versions of the Directory Sync tool before you try to install the latest version.

ErrorReRunConfigWizard.message: Unable to start synchronization due to configuration issues. To fix the issues, try running the Configuration Wizard. If you continue to see this error, please contact Microsoft Online Support.
ErrorReRunConfigWizard.resolution: Run the Directory Sync tool Configuration Wizard.

ErrorClearRunHistory.message: Could not clear the run history on the MIIS Server. Error returned is '{0}'. Contact Microsoft Online support.

ErrorNoStartConnection.message: Synchronization failed to start because of connection issues or domain controllers could not be contacted by the server. Verify that you are connected to the server and all the configured domain controllers are connected to the network. If you have recently deleted domain or naming context, please r
ErrorNoStartConnection.resolution: Confirm that the local Active Directory domain controllers can be accessed from the server running the Directory Sync tool.

ErrorNoStartCredentials.message: Synchronization failed to start because of credential problems. Rerun Configuration Wizard to update credentials for Synchronization.
ErrorNoStartCredentials.resolution: Run the Directory Sync tool Configuration Wizard, and reenter credentials. Also, confirm that the credentials have Administrator access to the portal.

ErrorStoppedConnectivity.message: Synchronization stopped because of connectivity loss. Restore connectivity to the server.
ErrorStoppedConnectivity.resolution: Confirm that the local computer can access the Internet. Have the user try to ping provisioning.microsoftonline.com to verify that the computer can reach the Microsoft Entra authentication system.

InstallPathLengthTooLong.message: The installation path is too long. Provide a path of 116 characters or fewer and then try again.
InstallPathLengthTooLong.resolution: If you use a custom path for the installation of the Directory Sync tool, the total path must contain fewer than 116 characters.

InsufficientDiskSpace.resolution: There's insufficient space to install the Directory Sync tool on the local workstation.

InvalidPlatform.message: The Azure Active Directory Sync tool must be installed on a computer running Windows Server 2003 Service Pack 2 or later.
InvalidPlatform.resolution: Make sure that the server on which the Directory Sync tool is being installed meets the minimum requirements.

InvalidUPNFormat.message: User Principal Name (UPN) is your logon name. This error is displayed when the user enters credentials for Microsoft Online that do not contain an "@" character.

ADCredsNotValid.message: The Enterprise Administrator credentials that you supplied are not valid. Supply valid credentials and try again.
ADCredsNotValid.resolution: The installation wizard couldn't verify that the user account that's used to install the tool is an enterprise administrator.

MachineIsNotDomainJoined.message: The computer is not joined to any domain.
MachineIsNotDomainJoined.resolution: Make sure that the server on which the Directory Sync tool is installed meets the minimum requirements.

MachineNotDomainJoined.message: The computer must be joined to a domain.
MachineNotDomainJoined.resolution: Make sure that the server on which the Directory Sync tool is installed meets the minimum requirements.

MIISSyncIsInProgressError.message: The synchronization engine is busy. Retry this operation after this synchronization session is complete.
MIISSyncIsInProgressError.resolution: There's an existing operation being completed by MIIS. Any new operation can be completed only after the current operation is complete.

PowerShellRequired.resolution: Make sure that the server on which the Directory Sync tool is installed meets the minimum requirements.

UnsupportedNameFormat.message: The name format is not supported. Two examples of the supported user name formats are: someone@example.com or example\someone.

UserNotAnEnterpriseAdmin.message: User '{0}' is not a member of the Enterprise Admins group.
UserNotAnEnterpriseAdmin.resolution: Manually add the local Active Directory user account that's used to run the Directory Sync tool to the Active Directory Enterprise Admin Group.

UnsupportedClientVersion.message: This version of the Directory Sync tool is no longer supported. Remove this version and then install the latest version from the Directory Synchronization page of the Migration tab in the Microsoft Online Services Administration Center.
UnsupportedClientVersion.resolution: Download the latest version of the Directory Sync tool. To do so, go to Install or upgrade the Directory Sync tool.

InternetQueryOptionError.message: Internet Explorer proxy settings were not read. Initial configuration using setup wizard may not be able to access online help. WinInet Error {0}
InternetQueryOptionError.resolution: The installation wizard couldn't read or change proxy settings in Internet Explorer. Verify that the proxy settings that are set in Internet Explorer are formatted correctly.

InternetSetOptionError.message: Internet Explorer proxy settings were not set. Initial configuration using setup wizard may not be able to access online help. WinInet Error {0}
InternetSetOptionError.resolution: The installation wizard couldn't read or change proxy settings in Internet Explorer. Verify that the proxy settings that are set in Internet Explorer are formatted correctly.

RichCoexistenceNotAllowed.message: Current local directory does not have Exchange 2010 installed. Rich coexistence is not allowed.
RichCoexistenceNotAllowed.resolution: Install all the prerequisites for a hybrid deployment before you try to install the Directory Sync tool.
